uses: Arundo calamaria is not the correct name for the plant you are referring to. However, a plant that is often referred to as Arundo is actually Arundo donax, also known as the giant cane or giant reed. Arundo donax has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. Its medicinal uses include treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant properties. It also has anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of conditions like arthritis.

Additionally, Arundo calamaria is used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and fever.
